news.title: Applied Optoelectronics Expands Spectrum Partnership Through QuantumLink Network Management Deployment (AAOI)
news.summary: Spectrum will deploy Applied Optoelectronics’ QuantumLink software across its connected 1. 8GHz amplifier network, extending the relationship beyond hardware into network intelligence and operational management.

news.title: Raymond James sees major upside for Applied Optoelectronics
news.summary: Investing.com -- Shares of Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ: AAOI) could have further room to run despite a more than 1,000% gain over the past year, according to Raymond James analyst Simon Leopold, who reiterated an Outperform rating and $160 price target following investor meetings with Chief Financial Officer Stefan Murry.
